description: Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.

This project implements a hybrid deep learning and machine learning framework inspired by the paper AI-Synthesized Image Detection: Source Camera Fingerprinting to Discern the Authenticity of Digital Images. It extracts 2048-dimensional deep features using a pretrained CNN and classifies source cameras using an SVM classifier.
Machine learning model evaluation and feature engineering framework with hyperparameter tuning, data balancing, and feature importance analysis.

Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.
Machine-learning-style optimization framework to find candidate two-dimensional conformal field theory partition functions
An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.

A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.

This project delivers a unified, data-driven framework for credit card fraud detection and credit scoring, engineered to empower financial institutions with high-precision risk intelligence. The solution operationalizes advanced machine learning pipelinesspanning LightGBM, XGBoost, CatBoost, Random Forests, and Neural Networks

The project leverages operando gas evolution data measured by online electrochemical mass spectrometry (OEMS) to enable earlier degradation-stage identification and long-horizon capacity forecasting for batteries.
Machine Learning framework for cloud cost prediction and idle resource detection.

MATLAB-based framework integrating structural analysis and machine learning for damage severity classification in 2D frame systems. Damage is modeled via stiffness degradation, with synthetic response data used to train predictive models. (Ongoing work)
A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.
Machine Learning-Assisted Performance Prediction and Design of Metal-Organic Frameworks for Deep Dehydration of Ethylene
Framework for deploying machine learning models to production using Docker and Kubernetes.

An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

Explore ThalesGroup's comprehensive framework for secure machine learning systems on this repository. Developed by Thales experts, this framework encompasses essential security requirements, guidelines, tools, and privacy recommendations tailored specifically for machine learning applications.

Comparative framework for healthcare AI reasoning using machine learning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and in-context learning (ICL). Evaluates accuracy, robustness, and knowledge drift to support reliable, interpretable decision-making in clinical settings.

NRLMF-DTI-MurrayaBAT is a drugtarget interaction framework that applies NRLMF-based negative inference to address data imbalance and employs supervised machine learning to predict interactions between Murraya paniculata bioactive compounds and brown adipose tissueassociated proteins in obesity-related conditions.
End-to-end Machine Learning algorithms implemented from scratch using only Python and NumPy. Focused on understanding the underlying mathematics and linear algebra without high-level frameworks.

Builds a market risk framework for U.S. Treasury yields using Factor Analysis to extract latent drivers, Agglomerative Clustering for regime detection, and Isolation Forest for tail events; explains ~70% of covariance.
Code for "Explainable machine learning framework for biomarker discovery by combining biological age and frailty prediction"
An open-source machine learning framework for global analyses of parton distributions.
A multimodal machine learning framework for tourism satisfaction prediction using BERT, ResNet, and DDA-optimized CatBoost with feature fusion and interpretability analysis.

Machine learning framework for multi-class product categorization in e-commerce using structured metadata and textual features. Combines TF-IDF, transformer embeddings (MiniLM), and ensemble models (Logistic Regression, XGBoost, MLP) to predict hierarchical product categories with strong F1 performance.
Hybrid Multi-Signal Framework for Automated Discovery of Hidden Failure Modes in Production Machine Learning Systems

Developed an ensemble machine learning framework for detecting and classifying obfuscated malware using the CIC-MalMem-2022 dataset. Applied feature selection, data balancing, and models like RF, XGBoost, and MLP, achieving robust detection across binary and multiclass tasks.
Framework for computing Machine Learning algorithms in Python using Dask and RAPIDS AI.
Machine learning framework for adverse drug reaction risk prediction in cardiovascular patients- proof of concept using FAERS data
A text-processing framework for machine-learning workflows based in python
Proyecto de Machine Learning para predecir la supervivencia en el Titanic usando Regresin Logstica y el framework CRISP-DM. Trabajo Sumativo 1 - U. Mayor
a framework for phylogeny-aware machine learning models
Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

A real-time, hybrid Graph Neural Network (GNN) and machine learning framework to detect organized fraud rings and synthetic identities in mobile money ecosystems. Features a dynamic transaction graph, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4j, and a FastAPI backend
Liumon is an experimental quantitative research framework for alpha factor discovery, machine learning ranking models, and systematic trading research.
A machine learning framework for large-scale land subsidence forecasting using Sentinel-1 InSAR time-series, ERA5-Land climate reanalysis, and SoilGrids data across 8 strategic regions in Iran.

This repository contains the full analysis, methodology, and results for a machine learning study focused on predicting Length of Stay in hospital admissions using **Electronic Health Record (EHR)** data.   The project explores how different preprocessing strategies and model frameworks impact predictive performance and feature interpretability.
Keep track of the newest machine learning frameworks on GitHub

An analysis framework for detecting market regime shifts in global energy commodities sector (20002024). This project applies advanced statistical methods and machine learning to uncover hidden patterns in crude oil, Brent crude, natural gas, heating oil, and RBOB gasoline prices, with practical applications for risk management and forecasting.

A lightweight, framework-agnostic gRPC library for serving machine learning models in Python.
Fraud Risk Management in Banking Systems by Shavana Shaik

BorderGuard AI is a multi-modal security framework designed to protect critical border infrastructure. It combines Unsupervised Machine Learning for sensor anomaly detection with Computer Vision for real-time surveillance monitoring.

A machine learning framework for modeling pediatric health trajectories using longitudinal clinical data. The project leverages LSTM-based deep learning to simulate disease progression, stratify risk levels, and generate predictive insights for pediatric patient outcomes.
A machine learning framework using a Random Forest classifier to assest and map disaster  damage from satellite imagery.
A high-level orchestration and pipeline framework for quantum machine learning
Machine Learning framework built from scratch in CPP.

"This project investigates how study behavior patterns and cognitive load indicators influence academic performance and proposes a machine learning-based framework to generate intelligent, personalized learning recommendations."
Hybrid machine learning and live-API framework for automated SOC threat triage

Multi-label learning has been a topic of research interest in multimedia, text & speech recognitions, music, image processing, information retrieval etc. In Multi-label classification (MLC) each instance is associated with a set of multiple class labels. Like other machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing plays an key role in MLC. Feature selection is an important preprocessing step in MLC, due to high dimensionality of datasets and associated computational costs. Extracting the most info
LLM implementations with AIX machine learning framework.
Comprehensive framework of Machine Learning and Blockchain to detect and prevent fraud in carbon credit market
IE University Capstone: Airline Passenger Satisfaction  Integrated Psychometric & ML Framework (IRT, K-Means, Random Forest, SHAP, Strategic Priority Matrix)
multiple machine learning and deep learning practice projects and framework practice repo

Mapping Alternate Scenarios of Forest Intactness (MASFI) is a cloud-based machine learning framework. It uses XGBoost regression and remote sensing data such as GEDI LiDAR to create high-resolution maps and statistics, supporting protected area planning and management.

I am MSc Data Science student dedicated to bridging the gap between statistical theory and computational application. With a foundational background in Statistics. I specialize in transforming complex datasets into actionable insight. Technical Toolkit: Python | R | Machine Learning | Statistical Analysis | MEL Frameworks | Program Management
This repository hosts some of the important files that helped me to learn effectively all about some Machine learning frameworks, especially based on Python.
A Machine Learning Framework for Taxi Fare Fairness with a Hybrid Metric to Identify Route-Level Pricing Bias
Neuro-Symbolic AI framework for automated cyber threat intelligence generation using hybrid reasoning, machine learning, and knowledge graphs.
Framework for solving discrete optimization problems using a combination of Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MIP) and Machine Learning (ML)
A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning

Iris Machine Learning Project to learn the basics of Data Visualization, EDA, Machine Learning and different classifiers. SeaBorn and Matplotlib Frame word will be used for data visualization and Scikit Learn Framework will be used for the Machine Learning part.

A comprehensive machine learning framework for Tunnel Boring Machine (TBM) performance prediction, uncertainty quantification, and predictive maintenance using multi-model ensemble learning with Dempster-Shafer evidence theory.

Machine learning framework for predicting kinaseligand binding affinities using ECIF and RDKit descriptors. This repository includes workflows for feature generation, model training, validation, external predictions, and consensus-based prioritization of high-confidence kinase-binding compounds for virtual screening applications
Triangle AI is a distributed machine learning framework for detecting file-based malware (PDF, SWF, Doc, Html).
This is a machine learning framework built by C++ with C++ metaprogramming. It is built just for fun.
An intelligent cybersecurity framework for malware detection and intrusion detection using machine learning, Tab-Transformer, LLM and data-driven threat analysis.
Quantum Machine Learning Framework on Python for diverse machine learning tasks.
A Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for Water Quality Assessment and Contamination Clustering in the Niger Delt
Predict traffic accident severity using advanced machine learning and explainable AI, enhancing road safety with clear insights from comprehensive data analysis.
A comparative machine learning framework for predicting physicochemical properties using 28 novel Weighted Sombor Indices.

The primary objective  is to develop a decentralized collaboration, privacy-preserving machine learning framework for the healthcare sector to enable multiple medical institutions to train a global AI model without even sharing raw patient data.
A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars and forks
Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python

An end-to-end Sports Analytics Platform that leverages Machine Learning, Deep Learning (YOLOv8), and modern web frameworks to analyze football player performance, market value, injury risk, and real-time player tracking from match videos.
An IoT-Driven Explainable AI Framework that monitors and explains Water Footprint in AI Data Centres and Crypto Mining using XAI, Machine Learning and Power BI.

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.
A machine learning (ML)-based framework for the inverse design of the surface milling process
Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.
Machine learning framework for the identification of Non-Coding RNAs
A framework for encapsulating and representing detection results and metadata into interoperable records about analytics subjects that are detected by machine learning pipelines in the edge
A machine learning framework for time-series energy forecasting, utilizing deep learning and exogenous weather data to predict power grid demand and generation."
Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

A curated collection of Google Colab notebooks demonstrating fundamental concepts in Data Science, AI, and Machine Learning, including OCR basics, CRISP-DM framework, and practical data analysis workflows.
Equitrain: A Unified Framework for Training and Fine-tuning Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
A unified framework for tabular, time-series, and multimodal machine learning
Edge-Aware Auto-Scaling Distributed Ledger Fabric with Machine-Learning Orchestrator Framework featuring Edge-Computing capabilities with Real-time architecture

A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

A hybrid machine-learning and EOF-based framework for long-lead ENSO prediction using oceanatmosphere predictors (Nio-3.4 SST, SOI, and warm water volume). The model integrates EOF-based dimensionality reduction with ridge regression and random forest to improve forecast skill up to 24 months.
A Rust machine learning framework.

Machine learning models for predicting postoperative delirium from perioperative EHR data, including baseline models, domain-structured ensembles, interpretability, calibration, and decision curve analysis.
Physics-informed and graph-based machine learning framework for predicting torsional strength of reinforced concrete beams, with VAE-based data augmentation and dataset support.
Global machine learning glacier mass balance framework, capable of assimilating all sources of glaciological and remote sensing data

ML Model Trainer  A Python-based framework for training, evaluating, and deploying machine learning models. Supports custom datasets, automated preprocessing, model selection, and export to formats like TensorFlow Lite or PyTorch. Ideal for beginners and developers building production-ready ML pipelines.

This project proposes a novel Ensemble learningbased framework for predicting anti-inflammatory small molecules, aiming to improve predictive accuracy and generalization over existing machine learning approaches.

This repository contains the implementation of an automated framework for burn severity classification based on medical image analysis, texture feature extraction, and supervised machine learning methods. The proposed approach focuses on interpretable feature-based modeling and includes the full pipeline from image preprocessing to classification.
Supplementary codes and data accompanying the manuscript "Lowering barriers to probing high-frequency variations in river chemistry through a frugal machine learning-based framework"
